top3.sql:
SELECT DISTINCT y.Consumption
FROM transactions_1k t
JOIN yearmonth y ON t.CustomerID = y.CustomerID
WHERE t.ProductID = 5
  AND t.Price > 29.00
  AND y.Date LIKE '2012-08%';

SELECT DISTINCT y.Consumption
FROM transactions_1k t
JOIN yearmonth y ON t.CustomerID = y.CustomerID
WHERE t.ProductID = 5
  AND t.Price > 29.00
  AND y.Date LIKE '2012-08%';

SELECT DISTINCT y.Consumption
FROM transactions_1k t
JOIN yearmonth y ON t.CustomerID = y.CustomerID
WHERE t.ProductID = 5
  AND t.Price > 29.00
  AND strftime('%Y-%m', y.Date) = '2012-08';

SELECT DISTINCT y.Consumption
FROM transactions_1k t
JOIN yearmonth y ON t.CustomerID = y.CustomerID
WHERE t.ProductID = 5
  AND t.Price > 29.00
  AND y.Date LIKE '2012-08%';

SELECT y.Consumption
FROM transactions_1k t
JOIN yearmonth y ON t.CustomerID = y.CustomerID
WHERE t.ProductID = 5
  AND t.Price > 29.00
  AND strftime('%Y', y.Date) = '2012'
  AND CAST(strftime('%m', y.Date) AS INTEGER) = 8;

SELECT DISTINCT y.Consumption
FROM transactions_1k t
JOIN yearmonth y ON t.CustomerID = y.CustomerID
WHERE t.ProductID = 5
  AND t.Price > 29.00
  AND strftime('%Y-%m', y.Date) = '2012-08';

final.sql:
SELECT DISTINCT y.Consumption
FROM transactions_1k t
JOIN yearmonth y ON t.CustomerID = y.CustomerID
WHERE t.ProductID = 5
  AND t.Price > 29.00
  AND y.Date LIKE '2012-08%';
